General.Name: Ausnutria Dairy Corp Ltd
General.Description: Ausnutria Dairy Corporation Ltd, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the research and development, production, marketing, processing, packaging, and distribution of dairy and related products, and nutrition products. It operates through two segments: Dairy and Related Products, and Nutrition Products. The company offers cow and goat-based milk formula products for infants. It also engages in the marketing and distribution of goat milk nutrition products; research and development, distribution, manufacturing, and sale of probiotic products, and related fermentation-related products; and provision of financing services. It offers its products under the Hyproca 1897, Kabrita, Allnutria, Youzhuang, Neolac, Augood, Oz Farm, AUNULIFE, and NC brand names. The company operates in the People's Republic of China, Europea, Southeast Asia, Australia, the Middle East, North and South America, and internationally. Ausnutria Dairy Corporation Ltd was founded in 2003 and is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. Ausnutria Dairy Corporation Ltd is a subsidiary of HongKong Jingang Trade Holding Company Limited.
General.Address: China Merchants Tower, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
